scripts.build: rm -rf dist/mailer && bun build src/mailer/server.ts --target=bun --outfile dist/mailer/server.mjs
scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-email... && ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-composer deploy module.ts ${EMAIL_STACK_NAME:+--name "$EMAIL_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-composer destroy module.ts --production ${EMAIL_STACK_NAME:+--name "$EMAIL_STACK_NAME"} )
